name: Accsoon SeeMo 4K HDMI Smartphone Adapter
description: Mobile content creators can save money and enjoy more flexibility when pairing this Accsoon SeeMo 4K HDMI Smartphone Adapter with their existing iPhone.

features.Key Features:: Use Your iPhone as a Camera Monitor | SEE App Provides Monitoring Tools | Livestream in 4K | Instant Social Sharing via iPhone | Powered by Optional Sony NP-F Battery | Doubles as an iPhone Charger | SD Card Reader for Fast File Transfers | Cold Shoe with USB-C Power Output | 90° Tilt with Cold Shoe Adapter | USB-C Video Output
